# mcmcdata

## Introduction

`mcmcdata` is an R package to manipulate Monte Carlo Markov Chain
samples and data.

## Installation

To install the latest version from GitHub

``` R
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("poissonconsulting/mcmcdata")
```

## Demonstration

``` r

library(mcmcdata)
#> 
#> Attaching package: 'mcmcdata'
#> The following object is masked from 'package:stats':
#> 
#>     filter

print(mcmc_data_example)
#> $mcmc
#> [1] 3.718025 4.718025
#> 
#> nchains:  2 
#> niters:  400 
#> 
#> $data
#> # A tibble: 2 × 3
#>   homeworld species films    
#>   <chr>     <chr>   <list>   
#> 1 Tatooine  Human   <chr [5]>
#> 2 Tatooine  Droid   <chr [6]>
#> 
#> attr(,"class")
#> [1] "mcmc_data"

md_ex <- slice(mcmc_data_example, c(1,2,2))
print(md_ex)
#> $mcmc
#> [1] 3.718025 4.718025 4.718025
#> 
#> nchains:  2 
#> niters:  400 
#> 
#> $data
#> # A tibble: 3 × 3
#>   homeworld species films    
#>   <chr>     <chr>   <list>   
#> 1 Tatooine  Human   <chr [5]>
#> 2 Tatooine  Droid   <chr [6]>
#> 3 Tatooine  Droid   <chr [6]>
#> 
#> attr(,"class")
#> [1] "mcmc_data"
md_ex <- group_by(md_ex, homeworld, species)
coef(summarise(md_ex))
#> # A tibble: 2 × 6
#>   homeworld species estimate lower upper svalue
#>   <chr>     <chr>      <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>
#> 1 Tatooine  Droid       9.44  6.42 12.5    9.65
#> 2 Tatooine  Human       3.72  2.21  5.23   9.65
```

## Citation

``` R
Warning in citation(package = "mcmcdata"): no date field in DESCRIPTION file of
package 'mcmcdata'
Warning in citation(package = "mcmcdata"): could not determine year for
'mcmcdata' from package DESCRIPTION file

To cite package 'mcmcdata' in publications use:

  Thorley J (????). _mcmcdata: Manipulate MCMC Samples and Data
  Frames_. R package version 0.0.1.9000.

A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users is

  @Manual{,
    title = {mcmcdata: Manipulate MCMC Samples and Data Frames},
    author = {Joe Thorley},
    note = {R package version 0.0.1.9000},
  }
```

## Contribution

Please report any
[issues](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/mcmcdata/issues).

[Pull requests](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/mcmcdata/pulls) are
always welcome.

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the mcmcdata project is released with a [Contributor
Code of
Conduct](https://contributor-covenant.org/version/2/0/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

## Inspiration

- coda and rjags

# Package index

## All functions

- [`anti_join(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/anti_join.mcmc_data.md)
  : Anti join mcmc data
- [`arrange(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/arrange.mcmc_data.md)
  : Arrange mcmcr data
- [`as_tibble(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/as_tibble.mcmc_data.md)
  : As Tibble
- [`bind_rows2()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/bind_rows2.md)
  : Bind Rows
- [`check_mcmc_data()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/check_mcmc_data.md)
  : Check mcmc data
- [`coef(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/coef.mcmc_data.md)
  : Coefficients
- [`fill_na(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/fill_na.mcmc_data.md)
  : Fill Missing Values
- [`filter(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/filter.mcmc_data.md)
  : Slice mcmcr data
- [`group_by(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/group_by.mcmc_data.md)
  : Group mcmc data
- [`inner_join(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/inner_join.mcmc_data.md)
  : Inner join mcmc data
- [`is.mcmc_data()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/is.mcmc_data.md)
  : Is an MCMC data object
- [`left_join(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/left_join.mcmc_data.md)
  : Left join mcmc data
- [`mcmc_data()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/mcmc_data.md)
  : MCMC Data
- [`mcmc_data_example`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/mcmc_data_example.md)
  : Example mcmc data Object
- [`mcmc_derive(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/mcmc_derive.mcmc_data.md)
  : mcmc_derive mcmc_data
- [`mcmc_derive_data()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/mcmc_derive_data.md)
  : Derive MCMC Data
- [`mcmc_derive_data(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/mcmc_derive_data.mcmc_data.md)
  : mcmc_derive mcmc_data
- [`mutate(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/mutate.mcmc_data.md)
  : Mutate mcmc_data
- [`rename(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/rename.mcmc_data.md)
  : Rename mcmcr data
- [`replace_na(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/replace_na.mcmc_data.md)
  : Replace Missing Values mcmc data
- [`right_join(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/right_join.mcmc_data.md)
  : Right join mcmc data
- [`select(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/select.mcmc_data.md)
  : Select mcmcr data
- [`semi_join(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/semi_join.mcmc_data.md)
  : Semi join mcmc data
- [`slice(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/slice.mcmc_data.md)
  : Slice mcmcr data
- [`summarise(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/summarise.mcmc_data.md)
  : Summarise mcmc data
- [`ungroup(`*`<mcmc_data>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/mcmcdata/reference/ungroup.mcmc_data.md)
  : Ungroup mcmc data
